'''P'hiili''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] creatures that were native to the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Yuuzhan'tar]]. When the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]], also native to Yuuzhan'tar, [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invaded]] [[The galaxy/Legends|another galaxy]], they took knowledge of the [[Gene/Legends|genetic makeup]] of the p'hiili with them. The aquatic creatures were recreated and placed on the [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|captured]] it in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].

==Biology and appearance==
P'hiili were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] creatures.<ref name="Final" />

==Behavior==
P'hiili made burring sounds,<ref name="Final" /> and they were typically kept in ponds or other water-filled areas outside of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] residences to act as a sort of organic alarm system. Another trait that made them useful as guards was their tendency to [[Diet/Legends|eat]] anything that came within reach, which classified them as omnivores.<ref name="TCSWE" />

==History==
The aquatic creatures originated on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Yuuzhan'tar]] prior to the beginning of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]<ref name="Final" /> in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> in which the Yuuzhan Vong invaded the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in order to find a new home after Yuuzhan'tar was destroyed. The Yuuzhan Vong took with them the [[Gene/Legends|genes]] of the p'hiili with the purpose of recreating the creatures later on. After the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|conquered]] the New Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="Final" /> in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]],<ref name="TEA" /> the p'hiili were recreated and placed on the newly [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] world, which had been renamed Yuuzhan'tar in memory of the Yuuzhan Vong's original [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. In 28 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]], on the new Yuuzhan'tar, some p'hiili were present in a pool of water that was overlooked by a [[Shrine of Yun-Harla|shrine]] to the Yuuzhan Vong [[Yun'o|god]] [[Yun-Harla]], and their cries intermingled with those of the [[ngom]], another type of creature.<ref name="Final" />

==Behind the scenes==
P'hiili first appeared in author [[Greg Keyes]]' [[2003]] novel, ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'', the penultimate installment in [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series.<ref name="Final" />

==Appearances==
